name: chrX_Xp22_33_PAR1_boundary_KAL1_region
description: PAR1 boundary at Xp22.33 (telomeric 2.781 Mb of chrX, X:1-2781479 in GRCh38) shared identically with Yp11.32 PAR1 (cross-ref). The PAR1 boundary harbors the ANOS1 (KAL1) gene whose deletion causes X-linked Kallmann syndrome. PAR1 itself is hemizygous for males outside the X-Y exchange region and shows the highest meiotic recombination rate in the genome (~20-fold above average).

architecture.internal_structure: PAR1 region 100% identical between Xp22.33 and Yp11.32; ANOS1/KAL1, STS-adjacent, ASMT, IL3RA, CSF2RA, SHOX, ZBED1, CRLF2.
